title: Project MMO: Vinery Compat
description: Adds compatibility between Project MMO and Vinery.
body:
Requires Project MMO and Vinery

About

This mod adds compatibility between Project MMO and Vinery

The Apple Press and Aging Barrel will grant XP for the CRAFT event. 

 

How To Use

Simply specify XP granted from on the CRAFT event using Project MMO datapacks on any of the relevant food items that these blocks can create and you're good to go. Please note that this mod adds XP based on the resulting item, NOT the ingredients. This means you need to make sure that you add CRAFT XP values to the resulting item in order to get the XP. Also from my testing it doesn't seem to show the CRAFT XP when you hover over the item. It should still give you XP for crafting it though.

 

Notes

This should be compatible with all other mods. Please report any bugs or issues to GitHub. If you're not getting XP for an item, make sure you've configured it correctly in Project MMO first.

 

It does have mixins for Vinery so it's possible a future Vinery update could break some of the mixins. If that were to happen I would likely fix it quickly, but in the meantime just don't update to the latest Vinery version if you want to keep using this mod.

 

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks, just have a link back to this mod if possible. This cannot be used in for profit modpacks or posted on any other sites.

 

Huge thanks to the developer of Project MMO, Caltinor, for tons of help on this mod (and many other things). Also huge thanks to LlamaLad7, the wizard of Oz (of mixins) on the NeoForge discord.
